subtopics.description: Current role title and primary responsibilities
coverage_criteria: Provides the official internal or external job title.
Identifies the main areas of work the role is accountable for.

subtopics.description: Main activities in a typical week
coverage_criteria: Names at least 3 distinct activities or tasks.
Each activity is a meaningful unit of work that the worker actually performs, not just a broad responsibility area, function, or end goal.
